title: Unity Runtime Template
description: A Unity project template built around custom memory allocators (Persist, Arena, Stack) and fixed-capacity, GC-free data structures for predictable runtime behavior. Features handle-based access with generation checks, a modular system architecture with explicit assembly dependencies, and reusable runtime primitives for performance-first projects.

title: Universe Multiplayer Mini-Games
description: Developed multiplayer mini-games for The Universe Platform including physics-based bomb-throwing and free-fall mechanics. Created custom Tween and node-based IK animation libraries to standardize team workflow.

title: Indie Games Collection
description: Created deep AI and gameplay systems for titles like Gladiator Graveyard and NecSurvimancery. Integrated complex action-based and state-machine AI techniques.
